---
title: Work in Progress Calendar (2024)
toc: false
---
## {}
Download here: [wip.ics](files/wip_2024.ics)


::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" collapse="true"}

### Instructions

Easiest: Download it on a phone and tap on it.

Otherwise, follow this link: [https://support.google.com/calendar/answer/37118](https://support.google.com/calendar/answer/37118)

:::
